programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action adventure with Clive Owen and Morgan Freeman. A medieval warrior emerges from exile to seek vengeance for his noble master, igniting a battle that will decide the fate of the kingdom (2015).
A gang led by Morgan Travis is planning to steal the Crown Jewels and replace Mannering with his exact double.
With many of the assailants accounted for, the team are faced with tracking down the surviving agents before they accomplish their mission of starting World War III (2/2) .
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
War drama starring John Mills. A WWII British submarine crew closes in on a deadly new German battleship. Just as they're ready to sink it, they run out of fuel. (1943)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Join officers from New Zealand Police as they patrol the streets and race to the scene of real-life emergency calls.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Steed and Tara investigate an unlikely suspect who is suddenly attracting the romantic affections of seasoned bureaucrats who are too keen to share their top secret information with her.
Steed and Tara are tasked with tracking a briefcase that is being passed around between enemy agents. Will the case expose a national security risk at the heart of government?
When Billy Blue Cannon is forced into a showdown with wanted gunfighters, he is saved by a wandering dentist who proves to be fast with a gun.
Tense action thriller starring Ray Winstone. A Boer War survivor is hired to track down a fugitive on the run. What should be a simple job, turns into a gripping game of cat and mouse. (2011)
Spy thriller starring Michael Caine and Jason Connery. Retired agent Harry Palmer returns to his high stakes day job to prevent North Korea getting its hands on a deadly biological weapon (1995).

Spy thriller starring Michael Caine and Jason Connery. Retired agent Harry Palmer returns to his high stakes day job to prevent North Korea getting its hands on a deadly biological weapon (1995).
A female criminal must return for trial after the miner she robbed dies.
Buck, Victoria and Manolito return to Montoya Ranch and become prisoners, with Don Sebastian, of a degraded former Civil War friend of Buck.
An old friend of Danny's, Angie, turns out to be a hit man. Brett warns Danny but he champions Angie - leading to a showdown which only one of them can survive.
Steed returns from holiday unable to remember anything from the past three weeks. Can Steed be stopped before he carries out his sudden urge to kill 'Mother'?
Steed joins the Jack The Ripper Club to investigate a series of murders. Can he and Tara unearth why the killer is targeting delegates attending an International conference?
Revolutionary epic with Mel Gibson, Heath Ledger and Joely Richardson. It's muskets out and tricorns on as war hero Benjamin Martin defends his home, family and nation from the invading Brits. (2000)

Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her (2018).

A gang robbing the Crown Jewels force Mannering to assist them.

Western with Jeff Fahey. In Australia's untamed outback, a woman will stop at nothing to save her family's ranch, while two rival suitors will risk everything to win her heart... (1989)
After a gang robs the saloon, the leader kills two of his men and flees Tombstone.
Claibourne witnesses Vic Reel kill a newspaperman from Denver; in his efforts to uncover the motive for the murder, Hollister succeeds in the capture of the Taylor gang.
A Rancher returns from Denver with his young bride and is baited into a gunfight by notorious gunslinger Vince Sanders.

Sheriff Clay Hollister sends for a woman lawyer to settle a dispute between a mine owner and a local businessman.
Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links them to the town's most respected woman. He must devise a plan to trap her but it'll have risks.
Fernando Lamas guest-stars as Mexican bandit turned revolutionary who captures and prepares to execute the Cannon Ranch hands to prove his power.
Danny finds himself in trouble after a dying parachutist chains him to an attache case containing secret information and something that is sure to create a 'bang'.
Can Steed prove Tara's innocence when evidence emerges of her working as a double agent and passing defence secrets onto suspected enemy agents?
Steed faces a race against time to locate Tara who has seemingly disappeared after visiting an antiques shop. The investigation soon leads him to a former agent.
Action thriller starring Jean-Claude Van Damme. The hunt is on in New Orleans when a tough drifter agrees to help find a missing father, only to become the target in a deadly game... (1993)

Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive (2015)?
